## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen instead.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, iOS 17, Android 14]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Pixel 8]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or console errors.
